mapper.select: SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.equipment_id AS equipmentId, eq.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ka.article_content AS articleContent, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.article_approval_opinion AS articleApprovalOpinion, ka.article_rejection_reason AS articleRejectionReason, ka.view_count AS viewCount, 0 AS commentCount, 0 AS reuseCount, ka.created_at AS createdAt, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ka.equipment_id = eq.equipment_id WHERE ka.article_id = #{articleId} AND ka.is_deleted = false

SELECT ka.author_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, COUNT(*) AS articleCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND ka.is_deleted = false AND YEAR(ka.approved_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(ka.approved_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) GROUP BY ka.author_id, e.employee_name ORDER BY articleCount DESC, ka.author_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.view_count AS viewCount, ka.created_at AS createdAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND ka.is_deleted = false ORDER BY ka.view_count DESC, ka.approved_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.article_content AS articleContent, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.article_approval_opinion AS articleApprovalOpinion, ka.article_rejection_reason AS articleRejectionReason, ka.created_at AS createdAt, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_id = #{articleId} AND ka.is_deleted = false AND ka.article_status = 'PENDING'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article WHERE article_status = 'PENDING' AND is_deleted = false) AS pendingCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article WHERE article_status = 'APPROVED' AND is_deleted = false AND YEAR(approved_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(approved_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())) AS approvedThisMonth,
ROUND( IFNULL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article WHERE article_status = 'REJECTED' AND is_deleted = false) * 100.0 / NULLIF( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article WHERE article_status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND is_deleted = false), 0 ), 0.0 ), 2) AS rejectionRate

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approvedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'DRAFT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS draftCount FROM knowledge_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT ka.article_id AS id, ka.article_title AS title, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt, ka.article_status AS articleStatus FROM knowledge_article ka WHERE ka.author_id = #{authorId} AND ka.is_deleted = false ORDER BY ka.updated_at DESC, ka.created_at DESC LIMIT 3
